zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume IV DE FORCALQUIER Comte de Forcalquier於1130年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培-德-豪-普洛福斯福爾卡爾時，他的父親Bertrand Comte Forcalquier22歲，母親Josserande de la Flotte20歲。他和Marguerite de Bourbon至少有1個女兒。他去世於1209年11月在他的家鄉享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume IV DE FORCALQUIER Comte de Forcalquier was born in 1130, in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, his father, Bertrand Comte Forcalquier, was 22 and his mother, Josserande de la Flotte, was 20. He had at least 1 daughter with Marguerite de Bourbon. He died in November 1209, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume IV DE FORCALQUIER Comte de Forcalquier est né en 1130, à Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Bertrand Comte Forcalquier, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Josserande de la Flotte, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Marguerite de Bourbon. Il est décédé en novembre 1209, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume IV DE FORCALQUIER Comte de Forcalquier 1130 in Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertrand Comte Forcalquier 22 und seine Mutter Josserande de la Flotte 20. Er hatte mit Marguerite de Bourbon mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb im November 1209 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume IV DE FORCALQUIER Comte de Forcalquier è nato il nel 1130 nel Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, il suo padre, Bertrand Comte Forcalquier, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Josserande de la Flotte, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Marguerite de Bourbon. Morì nel novembre 1209, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume IV DE FORCALQUIER Comte de Forcalquierが1130年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-デ-ハウテ-プローベンスフォーカルクイエルで生まれた時，父Bertrand Comte Forcalquierは22歳，母Josserande de la Flotteは20歳であった。彼はMarguerite de Bourbonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1209年11月に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume IV DE FORCALQUIER Comte de Forcalquier(이)가 1130년 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-데-하테-플로븐스 포캘키어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertrand Comte Forcalquier(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Josserande de la Flotte(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Marguerite de Bourbon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1209년 11월 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume IV DE FORCALQUIER Comte de Forcalquier nasceu em 1130, em Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Bertrand Comte Forcalquier, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Josserande de la Flotte, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Marguerite de Bourbon. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1209, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume IV DE FORCALQUIER Comte de Forcalquier родился в 1130 г. в местности форкалкуиир, алпес-де-хауте-провенс, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, его отцу по имени Bertrand Comte Forcalquier было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Josserande de la Flotte, 20. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Marguerite de Bourbon. Он умер ноябрь 1209 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume IV DE FORCALQUIER Comte de Forcalquier nació en 1130, en Forcalquier, Alpes-de-Haute-Provence, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Bertrand Comte Forcalquier, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Josserande de la Flotte, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Marguerite de Bourbon. Murió en noviembre de 1209, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
